name: mimecast-integration
description: Mimecast email security operations via MCP. Manage held messages, TTP logs, users, groups, policies, and audit events.

client_id.title: OAuth 2.0 Client ID
client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Mimecast Administration → Services → API and Platform Integrations. Required if not using Legacy HMAC auth.

client_secret.title: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret
client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Mimecast API application.

app_id.title: Legacy App ID (HMAC auth)
app_id.description: Application ID for Legacy HMAC authentication. Leave blank if using OAuth 2.0.

app_key.title: Legacy App Key (HMAC auth)
app_key.description: Application Key for Legacy HMAC authentication.

access_key.title: Legacy Access Key (HMAC auth)
access_key.description: Access Key for Legacy HMAC authentication.

secret_key.title: Legacy Secret Key (HMAC auth)
secret_key.description: Base64-encoded Secret Key for Legacy HMAC authentication.

region.title: Region
region.description: Your Mimecast data region: us, eu, de, au, za, ca, uk, or sandbox

tools.name: mimecast_list_ttp_url_logs
tools.description: Get TTP URL protection scan logs
